title: The History of the United States from Independence to Secession
further_info: Recommended Reading Sean Wilentz, Major Problems in the Early Republic 1787-1848, Lexington, Mass., 1992; Sean Wilentz, The Rise of American Democracy: From Jefferson to Lincoln. New York, 2005; Gordon S. Wood, Empire of Liberty: A History of the Early Republic. New York, 2009; Daniel Walker Howe, What Hath God Wrought: The Transformation of America, 1815-1848. New York, 2007; Walter A. McDougall, Throes of Democracy: The American Civil War Era, 1829-1877. New York, 2008.
